title: Crisp Citrusy Japanese Crustaceans Yakitori Skewers
description: A tangy and bouncy Japanese dish featuring crustaceans, ferment kimchi, and a citrusy twist, perfect for crowds, this egg-free friendly yakitori is cooked to perfection in a paella pan.
instructions: Preheat the paella pan over medium-high heat, adding sesame oil to coat the bottom.
Thread the shrimp and scallops onto yakitori skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger to make the citrusy glaze.
Brush the glaze onto the crustaceans, then cook the skewers in the paella pan for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Add the kimchi to the paella pan, stirring to combine with the crustaceans and glaze.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the kimchi is heated through and starting to caramelize.
Brush the yakitori sauce onto the skewers during the last minute of cooking.
Remove the skewers from the paella pan and serve immediately, garnished with additional kimchi and citrus wedges if desired.
